summary: Good matrix recording captures a smoking China Cat Sunflower→I Know You Rider set, an uplifting opening Truckin', and tight Scarlet Begonias→Fire on the Mountain.
review: The reviewer praises the matrix source as having good sound quality with no notable issues. Musically the show shines with a smoking China Cat Sunflower into I Know You Rider, an energizing opening Truckin', and a nicely executed Scarlet Begonias into Fire on the Mountain.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed positive review highlights strong performance and decent recording quality, leading to an estimated rating above four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes "good sound" with no complaints about clarity or balance.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: Opening with Truckin' sets a positive mood, and seamless transitions through China→Rider and Scarlet→Fire are highlighted as high points.
